sidebar.upgradeDescription: Upgrade your workspace to unlock more AI Employees.

dashboard.description: Manage your AI workforce, knowledge and customer operations from one workspace.

employees.title: AI Employees
employees.emptyDescription: Create your first AI Employee to start building your digital workforce.

quickActions.title: Quick actions
quickActions.description: Continue setting up your Sellora workspace.

createEmployee.title: Create AI Employee
createEmployee.description: Add a new digital employee to your workspace.

addKnowledge.title: Add knowledge
addKnowledge.description: Connect business information and verified sources.

connectChannel.title: Connect a channel
connectChannel.description: Prepare your website or API integration.

createAutomation.title: Create automation
createAutomation.description: Build a workflow for repetitive business tasks.

activity.title: Recent activity
activity.emptyDescription: Employee activity, conversations and knowledge updates will appear here.

aiEmployees.title: AI Employees
aiEmployees.description: Create and manage digital AI Employees for your business.
aiEmployees.emptyDescription: Build a digital employee that can answer customers, use your business knowledge and work across connected channels.

aiEmployeeCreate.title: Create AI Employee
aiEmployeeCreate.description: Set up the core identity and communication style of your new digital employee.

basicInformation.title: Basic information
basicInformation.description: Define who this AI Employee is and what role they perform.

communication.title: Communication
communication.description: Choose the default language and tone used in customer conversations.

name.label: Name
name.hint: Use a clear and recognizable name.

role.label: Role
role.hint: Describe the employee's primary business role.

description.label: Primary goal
description.placeholder: Describe what this AI Employee should help customers accomplish...
description.hint: You will add detailed instructions after creating the employee.

aiEmployeeInstructions.title: Instructions
aiEmployeeInstructions.description: Define the identity, objectives and behavioral boundaries of this AI Employee.

identity.title: Identity
identity.description: Describe who this AI Employee is and how they should understand their role.
identity.label: Employee identity
identity.placeholder: You are an experienced customer support specialist working for our company. Your responsibility is to help customers clearly, accurately and professionally...
identity.hint: Explain the employee’s expertise, responsibilities and position in the business.

goals.title: Goals
goals.description: Define the outcomes this AI Employee should work toward.
goals.label: Primary goals
goals.placeholder:
- Help customers resolve their questions
- Recommend suitable products
- Collect qualified lead information
- Escalate complex requests to a human
goals.hint: Write one clear objective per line. Keep goals measurable and business-focused.

rules.title: Rules
rules.description: Set mandatory behavioral rules that must be followed in every conversation.
rules.label: Behavior rules
rules.placeholder:
- Always use verified business information
- Never invent product details
- Ask clarifying questions when needed
- Be transparent when information is unavailable
rules.hint: Rules should be specific, unambiguous and easy for the AI Employee to follow.

responseStyle.title: Response style
responseStyle.description: Describe how answers should be structured and presented to customers.
responseStyle.label: Communication style
responseStyle.placeholder: Use concise paragraphs, clear language and short lists when useful. Avoid unnecessary jargon. End with one relevant next step when appropriate.
responseStyle.hint: Tone and language are configured separately. Focus here on structure, length and formatting.

restrictions.title: Restrictions
restrictions.description: Specify topics and actions that are not allowed.
restrictions.label: Prohibited behavior
restrictions.placeholder:
- Do not provide legal or medical advice
- Do not disclose confidential business information
- Do not promise discounts without authorization
- Do not discuss topics unrelated to the business
restrictions.hint: Include safety limits, prohibited topics and situations that require human escalation.

knowledge.title: Knowledge
knowledge.description: Connect the knowledge your AI Employee should use.
